subcodes.title: Words spoken at Rue St. Didier 30 in Paris, 1913-02-25
subcodes.first_line: When His Holiness the Báb arrived in Isfahan, Manuchehr Khan who had been converted from Christianity to [the] Muhammadan religion was the governor of the city.
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @stories; anecdotes, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @transcendence; unknowability of God
